title: Runway Generation Task
description: Represents an asynchronous generation task in the Runway API. Tasks are created when submitting video, image, or audio generation requests and can be polled for status and output.

id.description: The unique identifier for the generation task.

status.description: The current processing status of the task.

createdAt.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the task was created.

output.description: One or more URLs linking to the generated output media. Only present when the task status is SUCCEEDED.

failure.description: A description of the failure reason. Only present when the task status is FAILED.

ImageToVideoInput.description: Input parameters for image-to-video generation tasks.

model.description: The model to use for generation.

promptImage.description: An HTTPS URL, runway:// URI, or data URI containing an encoded image to use as input.

promptText.description: A text description of up to 1000 characters describing what should appear in the output.

duration.description: The duration of the generated video in seconds.

ratio.description: The aspect ratio of the output video.

TextToVideoInput.description: Input parameters for text-to-video generation tasks.

model.description: The model to use for text-to-video generation.

promptText.description: A text description of up to 1000 characters describing what should appear in the output.

duration.description: The duration of the generated video in seconds.

ratio.description: The aspect ratio of the output video.

TextToImageInput.description: Input parameters for text-to-image generation tasks.

model.description: The model to use for image generation.

promptText.description: A text description of up to 1000 characters describing what should appear in the output.

ratio.description: The aspect ratio of the output image.

VideoToVideoInput.description: Input parameters for video-to-video generation tasks.

model.description: The model to use for video-to-video generation.

promptVideo.description: An HTTPS URL or runway:// URI pointing to the input video.

promptText.description: A text description guiding the transformation of the input video.

ratio.description: The aspect ratio of the output video.

CharacterPerformanceInput.description: Input parameters for character performance (Act Two) generation tasks.

model.description: The model to use. Must be act_two.

reference.description: The driving performance reference controlling the character's movements.

ratio.description: The aspect ratio of the output video.

MediaReference.description: A reference to a media asset (image or video) used as input.

type.description: The media type of the input.

uri.description: An HTTPS URL or runway:// URI pointing to the media asset.

AspectRatio.description: Supported aspect ratios for generated media. Includes landscape (1280:720, 1584:672, 1104:832), portrait (720:1280, 832:1104), and square (960:960) formats.
